description.en: Before hacking, you must understand how computers and networks communicate. This is the foundation.
description.hi: Hacking start karne se pehle, computers aur networks kaise kaam karte hain, ye samajhna zaroori hai. Ye base hai.

tasks.title: Learn the OSI Model and TCP/IP stack
Understand IP addressing, Subnetting, and DNS
Learn basic Linux commands (ls, cd, grep, cat)
Understand HTTP/HTTPS protocols and status codes

description.en: Setting up your hacking lab safely using Virtual Machines.
description.hi: Virtual Machines ka use karke apna safe hacking lab setup karna.

tasks.title: Install VirtualBox or VMware
Download and verify Kali Linux ISO/VM Image
Install Kali Linux and configure Network Settings (NAT/Bridged)
Update & Upgrade Kali (apt update && apt upgrade)
Install a vulnerable target (e.g., Metasploitable 2)

videos.title: Ethical Hacking Full Course in Hindi

description.en: The most important phase. Finding out everything about the target before attacking.
description.hi: Sabse important phase. Attack se pehle target ke baare mein sab kuch pata lagana.

tasks.title: Passive Recon: WHOIS, DNS mapping, Google Dorks
Active Recon: Ping sweeps and port scanning
Mastering Nmap (Flags: -sS, -sV, -O, -p-)
Web Recon: directory brute-forcing (Gobuster, Dirb)

description.en: Identifying weak points in the systems and services discovered during recon.
description.hi: Recon mein mile systems aur services ke weak points ko identify karna.

tasks.title: Understand CVEs and Exploit Databases
Use Nmap scripting engine (NSE) for vuln scanning
Learn Nikto for web server vulnerability scanning
Set up and run Nessus/OpenVAS

description.en: Weaponizing vulnerabilities to gain unauthorized access to the target.
description.hi: Vulnerabilities ka use karke target system mein unauthorized entry lena.

tasks.title: Master Metasploit Framework (msfconsole)
Understand Reverse Shells vs Bind Shells (Netcat)
Web Exploitation: SQL Injection and XSS basics
Learn Burp Suite for manipulating web requests
Password Cracking with Hydra & John The Ripper

description.en: What to do after gaining access. Escalating to root/admin and maintaining access.
description.hi: Access milne ke baad kya karein. Root/Admin banna aur access banaye rakhna.

tasks.title: Use Meterpreter for post-exploitation
Linux Privilege Escalation (SUID, Sudo rights, Cron jobs)
Windows Privilege Escalation basics
Data exfiltration and pivoting

description.en: Attacking WiFi networks and intercepting network traffic.
description.hi: WiFi networks par attack karna aur network traffic ko intercept karna.

tasks.title: Learn Wireshark to analyze packet captures (PCAP)
Understand WEP, WPA, WPA2 vulnerabilities
Use Aircrack-ng suite for capturing handshakes
ARP Spoofing and Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) attacks

description.en: Hiding data and breaking encryption mechanisms.
description.hi: Data ko chupana aur encryption mechanisms ko todna.

tasks.title: Understand symmetric vs asymmetric encryption
Crack hashes with Hashcat
Use Steghide to hide text inside images
Understand encoding (Base64) vs encryption

description.en: Documenting your findings properly. The most critical skill for a professional.
description.hi: Apne attacks ko properly document karna. Ek professional ke liye sabse zaroori skill.

tasks.title: Learn CVSS scoring system
Understand the structure of a Penetration Test Report
Write a mock report for Metasploitable 2
Learn Markdown for note-taking (Obsidian/CherryTree)

description.en: Applying skills in legal, safe environments to build experience.
description.hi: Legal aur safe environments mein skills apply karke experience gain karna.

tasks.title: Create a TryHackMe account and complete beginner paths
Create a HackTheBox account and do 'Starting Point'
Participate in a beginner Capture The Flag (CTF) event
Build a methodology and stick to it
